fields.notes: Sterling Evolution Dry. No visible sheath damage. Used for Kootenai sessions with Josie. Check for soft spots annually.
Black Diamond Momentum. Webbing looks fine. Buckles functioning. No unusual wear on belay loop.
Scarpa Maestrale. Buckle 3 on right boot getting stiff. Sole lug wear at about 60 percent. Assess before ski season opens.
Black Diamond Traverse. Left basket cracked in spring, replaced with spare. Shafts straight. Grips worn but functional.
ResMed AirFit N30i. Northwest Medical Supply quarterly auto-ship. Cushion replaced July. Full mask frame due January per schedule.
Hoka Speedgoat 5. About 280 miles on them. Sole lugs still good. Replace around 400-450 miles.
Petzl Vasak. Front points sharp, checked April. Antiball plates intact. Getting older but solid for the terrain I use them on.
La Sportiva TX4. Rand holding up. Sole sticky on warm rock. Fine for another season.
Patagonia Down Sweater. Baffle repair on left shoulder still holding with seam tape. Loft still decent. Watch that repair through winter.
Osprey Talon 33 (running light at 28L typical load). Hip belt stitching solid. Hydration sleeve clean. No zipper issues.
Western Mountaineering Alpinlite 35F. Getting some loft compression. Still good to temp rated. Consider washing before next season. Maybe budget for replacement in 2027.
Big Agnes Copper Spur UL2. Seam tape delaminating on rain fly. Pole sleeve cracked on main hoop. Been repaired twice. Retirement coming. Check REI sale fall 2026.
